items.title: BBC in Tehran as mourners gather for former supreme leader's funeral
items.dek: Iranian authorities say they expect millions of people to take part in funeral commemorations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
items.body: Iranian authorities say they expect millions of people to take part in funeral commemorations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Americans have no idea what America’s 250th is actually celebrating
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Former chess champion Kramnik banned over cheating remarks
items.dek: The former Russian world chess champion had accused other players, including the late Daniel Naroditsky, of cheating.
items.body: The former Russian world chess champion had accused other players, including the late Daniel Naroditsky, of cheating.
